description: Manual per-tender overrides keyed by TfL btID (the numeric ID from the tender result URL: tfl.gov.uk/forms/13796.aspx?btID=<id>). Any field set here wins over scraped data when push-to-supabase.js writes to the `tenders` table. Use this to correct typos, add notes TfL hasn't published, backfill missing values where TfL listed N/A, or mark a tender as superseded. Entries whose key starts with an underscore (e.g. `_example`) are ignored — use them for documentation. Re-run `npm run push-to-supabase` to apply.

_example_partial.notes: Cost-per-mile recalculated after TfL clarified mileage in 2024-Q2 contract addendum.
